description.description: What this predicate means and when to use it.

lens.description: The lens that owns and defines this predicate.

value_pattern.description: Regex the value must match (for value_type=string or date).

domain.description: Entity class ids (prefixed with @) that the subject must be an instance_of (transitively). Null = no constraint.

range.description: Entity class ids (prefixed with @) that the value must be an instance_of (transitively), when value_type=entity. Null = no constraint.

cardinality.description: Cardinality constraint in the form 'min..max' where max can be * for unlimited.

inverse.description: Id of the inverse predicate, if one exists.

transitive.description: Whether this predicate chains transitively (default false).
